lines: mithilāsthaḥ sa yogīndraḥ kṣaṇaṃ dhyātvābravīn munīn
yasmin deśe mṛgaḥ kṛṣṇas tasmin dharmān nibodhata
vedāḥ sthānāni vidyānāṃ dharmasya ca caturdaśa
pātre pradīyate yat tat sakalaṃ dharmalakṣaṇam
śrutiḥ smṛtiḥ sadācāraḥ svasya ca priyam ātmanaḥ
ayaṃ tu paramo dharmo yad yogenātmadarśanam
catvāro vedadharmajñāḥ parṣat traividyam eva vā
sā brūte yaṃ sa dharmaḥ syād eko vādhyātmavittamaḥ
brahmakṣatriyaviṭśūdrā varṇās tv ādyās trayo dvijāḥ
niṣekādyāḥ śmaśānāntās teṣāṃ vai mantrataḥ kriyāḥ
garbhādhānam ṛtau puṃsaḥ savanaṃ spandanāt purā
ṣaṣṭhe 'ṣṭame vā sīmanto māsy ete jātakarma ca
ahany ekādaśe nāma caturthe māsi niṣkramaḥ
tūṣṇīm etāḥ kriyāḥ strīṇāṃ vivāhas tu samantrakaḥ
rājñām ekādaśe saike viśām eke yathākulam
vedam adhyāpayed enaṃ śaucācārāṃś ca śikṣayet
kuryān mūtrapurīṣe ca rātrau ced dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ
prāg vā brāhmeṇa tīrthena dvijo nityam upaspṛśet
triḥ prāśyāpo dvir unmṛjya khāny adbhiḥ samupaspṛśet
śudhyeran strī ca śūdraś ca sakṛt spṛṣṭābhir antataḥ
sūryasya cāpy upasthānaṃ gāyatryāḥ pratyahaṃ japaḥ
saṃdhyāṃ prāk prātar evaṃ hi tiṣṭhed āsūryadarśanāt
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kuryāt saṃdhyayor ubhayor api
tato 'bhivādayed vṛddhān asāv aham iti bruvan
āhūtaś cāpy adhīyīta labdhaṃ cāsmai nivedayet
brahmacarye sthito naikam annam adyād anāpadi
brāhmaṇaḥ kāmam aśnīyāc chrāddhe vratam apīḍayan
sa gurur yaḥ kriyāḥ kṛtvā vedam asmai prayacchati
upanīya dadad vedam ācāryaḥ sa udāhṛtaḥ
ete mānyā yathāpūrvam ebhyo mātā garīyasī
grahaṇāntikam ity eke keśāntaś caiva ṣoḍaśe
mātur yad agre jāyante dvitīyaṃ mauñjibandhanāt
yajñānāṃ tapasāṃ caiva śubhānāṃ caiva karmaṇām
madhunā payasā caiva sa devāṃs tarpayed dvijaḥ
pitṝn madhughṛtābhyāṃ ca ṛco 'dhīte ca yo 'nvaham
prīṇāti devān ājyena madhunā ca pitṝṃs tathā
sa tu somaghṛtair devāṃs tarpayed yo 'nvahaṃ paṭhet
sāmāni tṛptiṃ kuryāc ca pitṝṇāṃ madhusarpiṣā
pitṝṃś ca madhusarpirbhyām anvahaṃ śaktito dvijaḥ
vākovākyaṃ purāṇaṃ ca nārāśaṃsīś ca gāthikāḥ
itihāsāṃs tathā vidyāḥ śaktyādhīte hi yo 'nvaham
karoti tṛptiṃ kuryāc ca pitṝṇāṃ madhusarpiṣā
te tṛptās tarpayanty enaṃ sarvakāmaphalaiḥ śubhaiḥ
yaṃ yaṃ kratum adhīte ca tasya tasyāpnuyāt phalam
tapasaś ca parasyeha nityaṃ svādhyāyavān dvijaḥ
gurave tu varaṃ dattvā snāyād vā tadanujñayā
vedaṃ vratāni vā pāraṃ nītvā hy ubhayam eva vā
pañcamāt saptamād ūrdhvaṃ mātṛtaḥ pitṛtas tathā
etair eva guṇair yuktaḥ savarṇaḥ śrotriyo varaḥ
yatnāt parīkṣitaḥ puṃstve yuvā dhīmān janapriyaḥ
naitan mama mataṃ yasmāt tatrāyaṃ jāyate svayam
yajñastha ṛtvije daiva ādāyārṣas tu godvayam
caturdaśa prathamajaḥ punāty uttarajaś ca ṣaṭ
ity uktvā caratāṃ dharmaṃ saha yā dīyate 'rthine
sa kāyaḥ pāvayet tajjaḥ ṣaṭ ṣaḍvaṃśyān sahātmanā
pāṇir grāhyaḥ savarṇāsu gṛhṇīyāt kṣatriyā śaram
vaiśyā pratodam ādadyād vedane tv agrajanmanaḥ
pitā pitāmaho bhrātā sakulyo jananī tathā
gamyaṃ tv abhāve dātṝṇāṃ kanyā kuryāt svayaṃvaram
sakṛt pradīyate kanyā haraṃs tāṃ coradaṇḍabhāk
dattām api haret pūrvāc chreyāṃś ced vara āvrajet
aduṣṭāṃ tu tyajan daṇḍyo dūṣayaṃs tu mṛṣā śatam
akṣatā ca kṣatā caiva punarbhūḥ saṃskṛtā punaḥ
svairiṇī yā patiṃ hitvā savarṇaṃ kāmataḥ śrayet
sapiṇḍo vā sagotro vā ghṛtābhyakta ṛtāv iyāt
āgarbhasaṃbhavād gacchet patitas tv anyathā bhavet
anena vidhinā jātaḥ kṣetrajo 'sya bhavet sutaḥ
somaḥ śaucaṃ dadāv āsāṃ gandharvaś ca śubhāṃ giram
pāvakaḥ sarvamedhyatvaṃ medhyā vai yoṣito hy ataḥ
vyabhicārād ṛtau śuddhir garbhe tyāgo vidhīyate
adhivinnā tu bhartavyā mahad eno 'nyathā bhavet
mṛte jīvati vā patyau yā nānyam upagacchati
seha kīrtim avāpnoti modate comayā saha
tyajan dāpyas tṛtīyāṃśam adravyo bharaṇaṃ striyāḥ
strībhir bhartṛvacaḥ kāryam eṣa dharmaḥ paraḥ striyāḥ
yasmāt tasmāt striyaḥ sevyāḥ kartavyāś ca surakṣitāḥ
brahmacāry eva parvāṇy ādyāś catasras tu varjayet
evaṃ gacchan striyaṃ kṣāmāṃ maghāṃ mūlaṃ ca varjayet
sustha indau sakṛt putraṃ lakṣaṇyaṃ janayet pumān
yathākāmī bhaved vāpi strīṇāṃ varam anusmaran
svadāranirataś caiva striyo rakṣyā yataḥ smṛtāḥ
rakṣet kanyāṃ pitā vinnāṃ patiḥ putrās tu vārdhake
abhāve jñātayas teṣāṃ na svātantryaṃ kvacit striyāḥ
hīnā na syād vinā bhartrā garhaṇīyānyathā bhavet
seha kīrtim avāpnoti pretya cānuttamāṃ gatim
satyām anyāṃ savarṇāyāṃ dharmakāryaṃ na kārayet
savarṇāsu vidhau dharmye jyeṣṭhayā na vinetarā
viprān mūrdhāvasikto hi kṣatriyāyāṃ viśaḥ striyām
ambaṣṭhaḥ śūdryāṃ niṣādo jātaḥ pāraśavo 'pi vā
vaiśyāśūdryos tu rājanyān māhiṣyograu sutau smṛtau
vaiśyāt tu karaṇaḥ śūdryāṃ vinnāsv eṣa vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ
brāhmaṇyāṃ kṣatriyāt sūto vaiśyād vaidehakas tathā
kṣatriyā māgadhaṃ vaiśyāc chūdrāt kṣattāram eva ca
śūdrād āyogavaṃ vaiśyā janayāmāsa vai sutam
jātyutkarṣo yuge jñeyaḥ saptame pañcame 'pi vā
karma smārtaṃ vivāhāgnau kurvīta pratyahaṃ gṛhī
vedārthān adhigacchec ca śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca
snātvā devān pitṝṃś caiva tarpayed arcayet tathā
devebhyaś ca hutād annāc cheṣād bhūtabaliṃ haret
annaṃ pitṛmanuṣyebhyo deyam apy anvahaṃ jalam
svādhyāyaṃ satataṃ kuryān na paced annam ātmane
anagnam amṛtaṃ caiva kāryam annaṃ dvijanmanā
satkṛtya bhikṣave bhikṣā dātavyā savratāya ca
priyo vivāhyaś ca tathā yajñaṃ praty ṛtvijaḥ punaḥ
ahaḥśeṣaṃ sahāsīta śiṣṭair iṣṭaiś ca bandhubhiḥ
upāsya paścimāṃ saṃdhyāṃ hutvāgnīṃs tān upāsya ca
brāhme muhūrte cotthāya cintayed ātmano hitam
dharmārthakāmān sve kāle yathāśakti na hāpayet
etaiḥ prabhūtaiḥ śūdro 'pi vārdhake mānam arhati
panthā deyo nṛpas teṣāṃ mānyaḥ snātaś ca bhūpateḥ
śilpair vā vividhair jīved dvijātihitam ācaran
dānaṃ damo dayā kṣāntiḥ sarveṣāṃ dharmasādhanam
ācaret sadṛśīṃ vṛttim ajihmām aśaṭhāṃ tathā
traivārṣikādhikānno yaḥ sa hi somaṃ pibed dvijaḥ
prāksaumikīḥ kriyāḥ kuryād yasyānnaṃ vārṣikaṃ bhavet
eṣām asaṃbhave kuryād iṣṭiṃ vaiśvānarīṃ dvijaḥ
hīnakalpaṃ na kurvīta sati dravye phalapradam
yajñārthaṃ labdham adadad bhāsaḥ kāko 'pi vā bhavet
jīved vāpi śiloñchena śreyān eṣāṃ paraḥ paraḥ
na svādhyāyavirodhyartham īheta na yatas tataḥ
na viruddhaprasaṅgena saṃtoṣī ca bhavet sadā
na saṃśayaṃ prapadyeta nākasmād apriyaṃ vadet
nāhitaṃ nānṛtaṃ caiva na stenaḥ syān na vārdhuṣī
nekṣetārkaṃ na nagnāṃ strīṃ na ca saṃsṛṣṭamaithunām
na ca mūtraṃ purīṣaṃ vā nāśucī rāhutārakāḥ
ayaṃ me vajra ity evaṃ sarvaṃ mantram udīrayet
varṣaty aprāvṛto gacchet svapet pratyakśirā na ca
pādau pratāpayen nāgnau na cainam abhilaṅghayet
jalaṃ piben nāñjalinā na śayānaṃ prabodhayet
nākṣaiḥ krīḍen na dharmaghnair vyādhitair vā na saṃviśet
nācakṣīta dhayantīṃ gāṃ nādvāreṇa viśet kvacit
duṣṭā daśaguṇaṃ pūrvāt pūrvād ete yathākramam
jalānte chandasāṃ kuryād utsargaṃ vidhivad bahiḥ
samāpya vedaṃ dyuniśam āraṇyakam adhītya ca
ṛtusaṃdhiṣu bhuktvā vā śrāddhikaṃ pratigṛhya ca
dhāvataḥ pūtigandhe ca śiṣṭe ca gṛham āgate
āmṛtyoḥ śriyam ākāṅkṣen na kaṃcin marmaṇi spṛśet
na nindātāḍane kuryāt putraṃ śiṣyaṃ ca tāḍayet
karmaṇā manasā vācā yatnād dharmaṃ samācaret
asvargyaṃ lokavidviṣṭaṃ dharmyam apy ācaren na tu
vivādaṃ varjayitvā tu sarvāṃl lokāñ jayed gṛhī
pañca piṇḍān anuddhṛtya na snāyāt paravāriṣu
eṣām annaṃ na bhoktavyaṃ somavikrayiṇas tathā
bhojyānnāḥ nāpitaś caiva yaś cātmānaṃ nivedayet
goghrātaṃ śakunocchiṣṭaṃ padā spṛṣṭaṃ ca kāmataḥ
devatārthaṃ haviḥ śigruṃ lohitān vraścanāṃs tathā
cāṣāṃś ca raktapādāṃś ca saunaṃ vallūram eva ca
matsyāṃś ca kāmato jagdhvā sopavāsas tryahaṃ vaset
laśunaṃ gṛñjanaṃ caiva jagdhvā cāndrāyaṇaṃ caret
śaśaś ca matsyeṣv api hi siṃhatuṇḍakarohitāḥ
devān pitṝn samabhyarcya khādan māṃsaṃ na doṣabhāk
vaset sa narake ghore dināni paśuromabhiḥ
sammitāni durācāro yo hanty avidhinā paśūn
pātrāṇāṃ camasānāṃ ca vāriṇā śuddhir iṣyate
kāruhastaḥ śuciḥ paṇyaṃ bhaikṣaṃ yoṣinmukhaṃ tathā
bhūśuddhir mārjanād dāhāt kālād gokramaṇāt tathā
salilaṃ bhasma mṛd vāpi prakṣeptavyaṃ viśuddhaye
bhasmādbhiḥ kāṃsyalohānāṃ śuddhiḥ plāvo dravasya ca
vākśastam ambunirṇiktam ajñātaṃ ca sadā śuci
raśmir agnī rajaśchāyā gaur aśvo vasudhānilaḥ
vipruṣo makṣikāḥ sparśe vatsaḥ prasnavane śuciḥ
ajāśvayor mukhaṃ medhyaṃ na gor na narajā malāḥ
śmaśru cāsyagataṃ dantasaktaṃ tyaktvā tataḥ śuciḥ
snātvā pītvā kṣute supte bhuktvā rathyopasarpaṇe
ācāntaḥ punar ācāmed vāso viparidhāya ca
na vidyayā kevalayā tapasā vāpi pātratā
yatra vṛttam ime cobhe tad dhi pātraṃ prakīrtitam
nāpātre viduṣā kiṃcid ātmanaḥ śreya icchatā
vidyātapobhyāṃ hīnena na tu grāhyaḥ pratigrahaḥ
gṛhṇan pradātāram adho nayaty ātmānam eva ca
kapilā cet tārayati bhūyaś cāsaptamaṃ kulam
dātāsyāḥ svargam āpnoti pūrveṇa vidhinā dadat
yāvad vatsasya pādau dvau mukhaṃ yonyāṃ ca dṛśyate
tāvad gauḥ pṛthivī jñeyā yāvad garbhaṃ na muñcati
yathākathaṃcid dattvā gāṃ dhenuṃ vādhenum eva vā
yānaṃ vṛkṣaṃ priyaṃ śayyāṃ dattvātyantaṃ sukhī bhavet
ye lokā dānaśīlānāṃ sa tān āpnoti puṣkalān
kuśāḥ śākaṃ payo matsyā gandhāḥ puṣpaṃ dadhi kṣitiḥ
māṃsaṃ śayyāsanaṃ dhānāḥ pratyākheyaṃ na vāri ca
śrāddhaṃ prati ruciś caite śrāddhakālāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
agryaḥ sarveṣu vedeṣu śrotriyo brahmavid yuvā
yugmān daive yathāśakti pitrye 'yugmāṃs tathaiva ca
dvau daive prāk trayaḥ pitrya udag ekaikam eva vā
mātāmahānām apy evaṃ tantraṃ vā vaiśvadevikam
āvāhayed anujñāto viśve devāsa ity ṛcā
śaṃ no devyā payaḥ kṣiptvā yavo 'sīti yavāṃs tathā
yā divyā iti mantreṇa hasteṣv arghyaṃ vinikṣipet
dviguṇāṃs tu kuśān dattvā hy uṣantas tvety ṛcā pitṝn
āvāhya tadanujñāto japed āyantu nas tataḥ
apahatā iti tilān vikīrya ca samantataḥ
yavārthās tu tilaiḥ kāryāḥ kuryād arghyādi pūrvavat
dattvā arghyaṃ saṃsravāṃs teṣāṃ pātre kṛtvā vidhānataḥ
pitṛbhyaḥ sthānam asīti nyubjaṃ pātraṃ karoty adhaḥ
agnau kariṣyann ādāya pṛcchaty annaṃ ghṛtaplutam
kṛtvedaṃ viṣṇur ity anne dvijāṅguṣṭhaṃ niveśayet
savyāhṛtikāṃ gāyatrīṃ madhu vātā iti tryṛcam
japtvā yathāsukhaṃ vācyaṃ bhuñjīraṃs te 'pi vāgyatāḥ
annam iṣtaṃ haviṣyaṃ ca dadyād akrodhano 'tvaraḥ
ātṛptes tu pavitrāṇi japtvā pūrvajapaṃ tathā
annam ādāya tṛptāḥ stha śeṣaṃ caivānumānya ca
tad annaṃ vikired bhūmau dadyāc cāpaḥ sakṛt sakṛt
mātāmahānām apy evaṃ dadyād ācamanaṃ tataḥ
svastivācyaṃ tataḥ kuryād akṣayyodakam eva ca
dattvā tu dakṣiṇāṃ śaktyā svadhākāram udāharet
brūyur astu svadhety ukte bhūmau siñcet tato jalam
viśve devāś ca prīyantāṃ vipraiś cokta idaṃ japet
dātāro no 'bhivardhantāṃ vedāḥ saṃtatir eva ca
śraddhā ca no mā vyagamad bahu deyaṃ ca no 'stv iti
ity uktvoktvā priyā vācaḥ praṇipatya visarjayet
vāje vāja iti prītaḥ pitṛpūrvaṃ visarjanam
yasmiṃs tu saṃsravāḥ pūrvam arghyapātre niveśitāḥ
brahmacārī bhavet tāṃ tu rajanīṃ brāhmaṇaiḥ saha
yajeta dadhi karkandhumiśrān piṇḍān yavaiḥ kriyāḥ
abhiramyatām iti vaded brūyus te 'bhiratāḥ sma ha
ye samānā iti dvābhyāṃ śeṣaṃ pūrvavad ācaret
tasyāpy annaṃ sodakumbhaṃ dadyāt saṃvatsaraṃ dvije
piṇḍāṃs tu go'javiprebhyo dadyād agnau jale 'pi vā
prakṣipet satsu vipreṣu dvijocchiṣṭaṃ na mārjayet
haviṣyānnena vai māsaṃ pāyasena tu vatsaram
khaḍdāmiṣaṃ mahāśalkaṃ madhu munyannam eva vā
yad dadāti gayāsthaś ca sarvam ānantyam aśnute
kanyāṃ kanyāvedinaś ca paśūn vai satsutān api
dyūtaṃ kṛṣiṃ vāṇijyāṃ ca dviśaphaikaśaphāṃs tathā
śastreṇa tu hatā ye vai tebhyas tatra pradīyate
svargaṃ hy apatyam ojaś ca śauryaṃ kṣetraṃ balaṃ tathā
putraṃ śraiṣṭhyaṃ ca saubhāgyaṃ samṛddhiṃ mukhyatāṃ śubham
dhanaṃ vedān bhiṣaksiddhiṃ kupyaṃ gā apy ajāvikam
aśvān āyuś ca vidhivad yaḥ śrāddhaṃ saṃprayacchati
āyuḥ prajāṃ dhanaṃ vidyāṃ svargaṃ mokṣaṃ sukhāni ca
prayacchanti tathā rājyaṃ prītā nṝṇāṃ pitāmahāḥ
gaṇānām ādhipatye ca rudreṇa brahmaṇā tathā
kumārī ca na bhartāram apatyaṃ garbham aṅganā
ācāryatvaṃ śrotriyaś ca na śiṣyo 'dhyayanaṃ tathā
vaṇiglābhaṃ na cāpnoti kṛṣiṃ cāpi kṛṣīvalaḥ
mṛttikāṃ rocanāṃ gandhān gugguluṃ cāpsu nikṣipet
yā āhṛtā hy ekavarṇaiś caturbhiḥ kalaśair hradāt
carmaṇy ānaḍuhe rakte sthāpyaṃ bhadrāsanaṃ tataḥ
tena tvām abhiṣiñcāmi pāvamānyaḥ punantu te
bhagaṃ te varuṇo rājā bhagaṃ sūryo bṛhaspatiḥ
bhagam indraś ca vāyuś ca bhagaṃ saptarṣayo daduḥ
yat te keśeṣu daurbhāgyaṃ sīmante yac ca mūrdhani
lalāṭe karṇayor akṣṇor āpas tad ghnantu sarvadā
juhuyān mūrdhani kuśān savyena parigṛhya ca
mitaś ca sammitaś caiva tathā śālakaṭaṅkaṭau
dadyāc catuṣpathe śūrpe kuśān āstīrya sarvataḥ
kṛtākṛtāṃs taṇḍulāṃś ca palalaudanam eva ca
matsyān pakvāṃs tathaivāmān māṃsam etāvad eva tu
puṣpaṃ citraṃ sugandhaṃ ca surāṃ ca trividhām api
dadhy annaṃ pāyasaṃ caiva guḍapiṣṭaṃ samodakam
etān sarvān samāhṛtya bhūmau kṛtvā tataḥ śiraḥ
rūpaṃ dehi yaśo dehi bhagaṃ bhavati dehi me
putrān dehi dhanaṃ dehi sarvakāmāṃś ca dehi me
brāhmaṇān bhojayed dadyād vastrayugmaṃ guror api
evaṃ vināyakaṃ pūjya grahāṃś caiva vidhānataḥ
karmaṇāṃ phalam āpnoti śriyaṃ cāpnoty anuttamām
ādityasya sadā pūjāṃ tilakaṃ svāminas tathā
śukraḥ śanaiścaro rāhuḥ ketuś ceti grahāḥ smṛtāḥ
rājatād ayasaḥ sīsāt kāṃsyāt kāryā grahāḥ kramāt
svavarṇair vā paṭe lekhyā gandhair maṇḍalakeṣu vā
gandhāś ca balayaś caiva dhūpo deyaś ca gugguluḥ
ākṛṣṇena imaṃ devā agnir mūrdhā divaḥ kakut
śaṃ no devīs tathā kāṇḍāt ketuṃ kṛṇvann imāṃs tathā
udumbaraḥ śamī dūrvā kuśāś ca samidhaḥ kramāt
ekaikasya tv aṣṭaśatam aṣṭāviṃśatir eva vā
hotavyā madhusarpirbhyāṃ dadhnā kṣīreṇa vā yutāḥ
dadhyodanaṃ haviś cūrṇaṃ māṃsaṃ citrānnam eva ca
dadyād grahakramād evaṃ dvijebhyo bhojanaṃ budhaḥ
dhenuḥ śaṅkhas tathānaḍvān hema vāso hayaḥ kramāt
kṛṣṇā gaur āyasaṃ chāga etā vai dakṣiṇāḥ smṛtāḥ
yaś ca yasya yadā duḥsthaḥ sa taṃ yatnena pūjayet
bhāvābhāvau ca jagatas tasmāt pūjyatamā grahāḥ
grahāṇām idam ātithyaṃ kuryāt saṃvatsarād api
vinītas tv atha vārtāyāṃ trayyāṃ caiva narādhipaḥ
sa mantriṇaḥ prakurvīta prājñān maulān sthirān śucīn
taiḥ sārdhaṃ cintayed rājyaṃ vipreṇātha tataḥ svayam
bhogāṃś ca dadyād viprebhyo vasūni vividhāni ca
agneḥ sakāśād viprāgnau hutaṃ śreṣṭham ihocyate
alabdham īhed dharmeṇa labdhaṃ yatnena pālayet
pālitaṃ vardhayen nītyā vṛddhaṃ pātreṣu nikṣipet
dattvā bhūmiṃ nibandhaṃ vā kṛtvā lekhyaṃ tu kārayet
ramyaṃ paśavyam ājīvyaṃ jāṅgalaṃ deśam āvaset
tatra tatra ca niṣṇātān adhyakṣān kuśalān śucīn
nātaḥ parataro dharmo nṛpāṇāṃ yad raṇārjitam
viprebhyo dīyate dravyaṃ prajābhyaś cābhayaṃ sadā
akūṭair āyudhair yānti te svargaṃ yogino yathā
vyavahārāṃs tato dṛṣṭvā snātvā bhuñjīta kāmataḥ
paśyec cārāṃs tato dūtān preṣayen mantrisaṃgataḥ
tataḥ svairavihārī syān mantribhir vā samāgataḥ
balānāṃ darśanaṃ kṛtvā senānyā saha cintayet
gītanṛtyaiś ca bhuñjīta paṭhet svādhyāyam eva ca
preṣayec ca tataś cārān sveṣv anyeṣu ca sādarān
dṛṣṭvā jyotirvido vaidyān dadyād gāṃ kāñcanaṃ mahīm
naiveśikāni ca tataḥ śrotriyebhyo gṛhāṇi ca
syād rājā bhṛtyavargeṣu prajāsu ca yathā pitā
pīḍyamānāḥ prajā rakṣet kāyasthaiś ca viśeṣataḥ
tasmāt tu nṛpater ardhaṃ yasmād gṛhṇāty asau karān
ye rāṣṭrādhikṛtās teṣāṃ cārair jñātvā viceṣṭitam
sādhūn sammānayed rājā viparītāṃś ca ghātayet
rājñaḥ kulaṃ śriyaṃ prāṇāṃś cādagdhvā na nivartate
tam eva kṛtsnam āpnoti pararāṣṭraṃ vaśaṃ nayan
yasmin deśe ya ācāro vyavahāraḥ kulasthitiḥ
mantramūlaṃ yato rājyaṃ tasmān mantraṃ surakṣitam
kuryād yathāsya na viduḥ karmaṇām āphalodayāt
upāyāḥ sāma dānaṃ ca bhedo daṇḍas tathaiva ca
samyakprayuktāḥ sidhyeyur daṇḍas tv agatikā gatiḥ
saṃdhiṃ ca vigrahaṃ yānam āsanaṃ saṃśrayaṃ tathā
paraś ca hīna ātmā ca hṛṣṭavāhanapūruṣaḥ
kecid daivāt svabhāvād vā kālāt puruṣakārataḥ
yathā hy ekena cakreṇa rathasya na gatir bhavet
evaṃ puruṣakāreṇa vinā daivaṃ na sidhyati
ato yateta tatprāptyai rakṣet satyaṃ samāhitaḥ
svāmy amātyā jano durgaṃ kośo daṇḍas tathaiva ca
mitrāṇy etāḥ prakṛtayo rājyaṃ saptāṅgam ucyate
tad avāpya nṛpo daṇḍaṃ durvṛtteṣu nipātayet
dharmo hi daṇḍarūpeṇa brahmaṇā nirmitaḥ purā
jagad ānandayet sarvam anyathā tat prakopayet
api bhrātā suto 'rghyo vā śvaśuro mātulo 'pi vā
nādaṇḍyo nāma rājño 'sti dharmād vicalitaḥ svakāt
yo daṇḍyān daṇḍayed rājā samyag vadhyāṃś ca ghātayet
kulāni jātīḥ śreṇīś ca gaṇān jānapadān api
svadharmāc calitān rājā vinīya sthāpayet pathi
te 'ṣṭau likṣā tu tās tisro rājasarṣapa ucyate
gauras tu te trayaḥ ṣaṭ te yavo madhyas tu te trayaḥ
kṛṣṇalaḥ pañca te māṣas te suvarṇas tu ṣoḍaśa
palaṃ suvarṇāś catvāraḥ pañca vāpi prakīrtitam
dve kṛṣṇale rūpyamāṣo dharaṇaṃ ṣoḍaśaiva te
śatamānaṃ tu daśabhir dharaṇaiḥ palam eva tu
niṣkaṃ suvarṇāś catvāraḥ kārṣikas tāmrikaḥ paṇaḥ
tadardhaṃ madhyamaḥ proktas tadardham adhamaḥ smṛtaḥ
dhigdaṇḍas tv atha vāgdaṇḍo dhanadaṇḍo vadhas tathā
yojyā vyastāḥ samastā vā hy aparādhavaśād ime
jñātvāparādhaṃ deśaṃ ca kālaṃ balam athāpi vā
vayaḥ karma ca vittaṃ ca daṇḍaṃ daṇḍyeṣu pātayet
vyavahārān nṛpaḥ paśyed vidvadbhir brāhmaṇaiḥ saha
rājñā sabhāsadaḥ kāryā ripau mitre ca ye samāḥ
sabhyāḥ pṛthak pṛthag daṇḍyā vivādād dviguṇaṃ damam
āvedayati ced rājñe vyavahārapadaṃ hi tat
abhiyuktaṃ ca nānyena noktaṃ viprakṛtiṃ nayet
kuryāt pratyabhiyogaṃ ca kalahe sāhaseṣu ca
nihnave bhāvito dadyād dhanaṃ rājñe ca tatsamam
deśād deśāntaraṃ yāti sṛkkiṇī parileḍhi ca
lalāṭaṃ svidyate cāsya mukhaṃ vaivarṇyam eti ca
vākcakṣuḥ pūjayati no tathauṣṭhau nirbhujaty api
abhiyoge 'tha sākṣye vā duṣṭaḥ sa parikīrtitaḥ
saṃdigdhārthaṃ svatantro yaḥ sādhayed yaś ca niṣpatet
na cāhūto vadet kiṃcid dhīno daṇḍyaś ca sa smṛtaḥ
sapaṇaś ced vivādaḥ syāt tatra hīnaṃ tu dāpayet
daṇḍaṃ ca svapaṇaṃ caiva dhanine dhanam eva ca
chalaṃ nirasya bhūtena vyavahārān nayen nṛpaḥ
dāpyaḥ sarvaṃ nṛpeṇārthaṃ na grāhyas tv aniveditaḥ
smṛtyor virodhe nyāyas tu balavān vyavahārataḥ
arthaśāstrāt tu balavad dharmaśāstram iti sthitiḥ
pramāṇaṃ likhitaṃ bhuktiḥ sākṣiṇaś ceti kīrtitam
ādhau pratigrahe krīte pūrvā tu balavattarā
daṇḍaṃ ca tatsamaṃ rājñe śaktyapekṣam athāpi vā
āgame 'pi balaṃ naiva bhuktiḥ stokāpi yatra no
āgamas tu kṛto yena so 'bhiyuktas tam uddharet
na tatsutas tatsuto vā bhuktis tatra garīyasī
yo 'bhiyuktaḥ paretaḥ syāt tasya rikthī tam uddharet
na tatra kāraṇaṃ bhuktir āgamena vinākṛtā
pūrvaṃ pūrvaṃ guru jñeyaṃ vyavahāravidhau nṛṇām
vibhāvayen na cel liṅgais tatsamaṃ daṇḍam arhati
rājā labdhvā nidhiṃ dadyād dvijebhyo 'rdhaṃ dvijaḥ punaḥ
vidvān aśeṣam ādadyāt sa sarvasya prabhur yataḥ
itareṇa nidhau labdhe rājā ṣaṣṭhāṃśam āharet
aniveditavijñāto dāpyas taṃ daṇḍam eva ca
deyaṃ caurahṛtaṃ dravyaṃ rājñā jānapadāya tu
adadad dhi samāpnoti kilbiṣaṃ yasya tasya tat
aśītibhāgo vṛddhiḥ syān māsi māsi sabandhake
kāntāragās tu daśakaṃ sāmudrā viṃśakaṃ śatam
dadyur vā svakṛtāṃ vṛddhiṃ sarve sarvāsu jātiṣu
prapannaṃ sādhayann arthaṃ na vācyo nṛpater bhavet
sādhyamāno nṛpaṃ gacchan daṇḍyo dāpyaś ca taddhanam
pañcakaṃ ca śataṃ dāpyaḥ prāptārtho hy uttamarṇikaḥ
brāhmaṇas tu parikṣīṇaḥ śanair dāpyo yathodayam
dīyamānaṃ na gṛhṇāti prayuktaṃ yaḥ svakaṃ dhanam
madhyasthasthāpitaṃ cet syād vardhate na tataḥ param
avibhaktaiḥ kuṭumbārthe yad ṛṇaṃ tu kṛtaṃ bhavet
dadyus tad rikthinaḥ prete proṣite vā kuṭumbini
na yoṣitpatiputrābhyāṃ na putreṇa kṛtaṃ pitā
dadyād ṛte kuṭumbārthān na patiḥ strīkṛtaṃ tathā
vṛthādānaṃ tathaiveha putro dadyān na paitṛkam
ṛṇaṃ dadyāt patis teṣāṃ yasmād vṛttis tadāśrayā
pratipannaṃ striyā deyaṃ patyā vā saha yat kṛtam
svayaṃkṛtaṃ vā yad ṛṇaṃ nānyat strī dātum arhati
rikthagrāha ṛṇaṃ dāpyo yoṣidgrāhas tathaiva ca
bhrātṝṇām atha daṃpatyoḥ pituḥ putrasya caiva hi
prātibhāvyam ṛṇaṃ sākṣyam avibhakte na tu smṛtam
ādyau tu vitathe dāpyāv itarasya sutā api
na tatputrā ṛṇaṃ dadyur dadyur dānāya yaḥ sthitaḥ
bahavaḥ syur yadi svāṃśair dadyuḥ pratibhuvo dhanam
pratibhūr dāpito yat tu prakāśaṃ dhanino dhanam
dviguṇaṃ pratidātavyam ṛṇikais tasya tad bhavet
saṃtatiḥ strīpaśuṣv eva dhānyaṃ triguṇam eva ca
vastraṃ caturguṇaṃ proktaṃ rasaś cāṣṭaguṇas tathā
ādhiḥ praṇaśyed dviguṇe dhane yadi na mokṣyate
kāle kālakṛto naśyet phalabhogyo na naśyati
gopyādhibhoge no vṛddhiḥ sopakāre ca hāpite
naṣṭo deyo vinaṣṭaś ca daivarājakṛtād ṛte
yātaś ced anya ādheyo dhanabhāg vā dhanī bhavet
yadā tu dviguṇībhūtam ṛṇam ādhau tadā khalu
mocya ādhis tadutpanne praviṣṭe dviguṇe dhane
dravyaṃ tad aupanidhikaṃ pratideyaṃ tathaiva tat
bhreṣaś cen mārgite 'adatte dāpyo daṇḍaṃ ca tatsamam
ājīvan svecchayā daṇḍyo dāpyas taṃ cāpi sodayam
yathājāti yathāvarṇaṃ sarve sarveṣu vā smṛtāḥ
sāhasī dṛṣṭadoṣaś ca nirdhūtādyās tv asākṣiṇaḥ
agnidānāṃ ca ye lokā ye ca strībālaghātinām
sa tān sarvān avāpnoti yaḥ sākṣyam anṛtaṃ vadet
sukṛtaṃ yat tvayā kiṃcij janmāntaraśataiḥ kṛtam
tat sarvaṃ tasya jānīhi yaṃ parājayase mṛṣā
abruvan hi naraḥ sākṣyam ṛṇaṃ sadaśabandhakam
na dadāti hi yaḥ sākṣyaṃ jānann api narādhamaḥ
sa kūṭasākṣiṇāṃ pāpais tulyo daṇḍena caiva hi
dvaidhe bahūnāṃ vacanaṃ sameṣu guṇināṃ tathā
guṇidvaidhe tu vacanaṃ grāhyaṃ ye guṇavattamāḥ
yasyocuḥ sākṣiṇaḥ satyāṃ pratijñāṃ sa jayī bhavet
anyathā vādino yasya dhruvas tasya parājayaḥ
ukte 'pi sākṣibhiḥ sākṣye yady anye guṇavattamāḥ
dviguṇā vānyathā brūyuḥ kūṭāḥ syuḥ pūrvasākṣiṇaḥ
pṛthak pṛthag daṇḍanīyāḥ kūṭakṛt sākṣiṇas tathā
vivādād dviguṇaṃ daṇḍaṃ vivāsyo brāhmaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ
yaḥ sākṣyaṃ śrāvito 'nyebhyo nihnute tat tamovṛtaḥ
sa dāpyo 'ṣṭaguṇaṃ daṇḍaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ tu vivāsayet
varṇināṃ hi vadho yatra tatra sākṣy anṛtaṃ vadet
yaḥ kaścid artho niṣṇātaḥ svarucyā tu parasparam
lekhyaṃ tu sākṣimat kāryaṃ tasmin dhanikapūrvakam
atrāham amukaḥ sākṣī likheyur iti te samāḥ
likhitaṃ hy amukeneti lekhako 'nte tato likhet
vināpi sākṣibhir lekhyaṃ svahastalikhitaṃ tu yat
tat pramāṇaṃ smṛtaṃ lekhyaṃ balopadhikṛtād ṛte
ṛṇaṃ lekhyakṛtaṃ deyaṃ puruṣais tribhir eva tu
ādhis tu bhujyate tāvad yāvat tan na pradīyate
bhinne dagdhe 'thavā chinne lekhyam anyat tu kārayet
lekhyasya pṛṣṭhe 'bhilikhed dattvā dattvā rṇiko dhanam
dattvā rṇaṃ pāṭayel lekhyaṃ śuddhyai vānyat tu kārayet
sākṣimac ca bhaved yad vā tad dātavyaṃ sasākṣikam
rucyā vānyataraḥ kuryād itaro vartayec chiraḥ
agnir jalaṃ vā śūdrasya yavāḥ sapta viṣasya vā
nāsahasrād dharet phālaṃ na viṣaṃ na tulāṃ tathā
nṛpārtheṣv abhiśāpe ca vaheyuḥ śucayaḥ sadā
tvaṃ tule satyadhāmāsi purā devair vinirmitā
tat satyaṃ vada kalyāṇi saṃśayān māṃ vimocaya
yady asmi pāpakṛn mātas tato māṃ tvam adho naya
śuddhaś ced gamayordhvaṃ māṃ tulām ity abhimantrayet
tvam agne sarvabhūtānām antaś carasi pāvaka
sākṣivat puṇyapāpebhyo brūhi satyaṃ kave mama
tasyety uktavato lauhaṃ pañcāśat palikaṃ samam
agnivarṇaṃ nyaset piṇḍaṃ hastayor ubhayor api
sa tam ādāya saptaiva maṇḍalāni śanair vrajet
antarā patite piṇḍe saṃdehe vā punar haret
satyena mābhirakṣa tvaṃ varuṇety abhiśāpya kam
samakālam iṣuṃ muktam ānīyānyo javī naraḥ
gate tasmin nimagnāṅgaṃ paśyec cec chuddhim āpnuyāt
tvaṃ viṣa brahmaṇaḥ putraḥ satyadharme vyavasthitaḥ
evam uktvā viṣaṃ śārṅgaṃ bhakṣayed dhimaśailajam
yasya vegair vinā jīryec chuddhiṃ tasya vinirdiśet
saṃsrāvya pāyayet tasmāj jalaṃ tu prasṛtitrayam
arvāk caturdaśād ahno yasya no rājadaivikam
vyasanaṃ jāyate ghoraṃ sa śuddhaḥ syān na saṃśayaḥ
vibhāgaṃ cet pitā kuryād icchayā vibhajet sutān
jyeṣṭhaṃ vā śreṣṭhabhāgena sarve vā syuḥ samāṃśinaḥ
yadi kuryāt samān aṃśān patnyaḥ kāryāḥ samāṃśikāḥ
na dattaṃ strīdhanaṃ yāsāṃ bhartrā vā śvaśureṇa vā
vibhajeran sutāḥ pitror ūrdhvaṃ riktham ṛṇaṃ samam
mātur duhitaraḥ śeṣam ṛṇāt tābhya ṛte 'nvayaḥ
maitramaudvāhikaṃ caiva dāyādānāṃ na tad bhavet
kramād abhyāgataṃ dravyaṃ hṛtam apy uddharet tu yaḥ
dāyādebhyo na tad dadyād vidyayā labdham eva ca
bhūr yā pitāmahopāttā nibandho dravyam eva vā
tatra syāt sadṛśaṃ svāmyaṃ pituḥ putrasya caiva hi
dṛśyād vā tad vibhāgaḥ syād āyavyayaviśodhitāt
pitṛbhyāṃ yasya tad dattaṃ tat tasyaiva dhanaṃ bhavet
pitur ūrdhvaṃ vibhajatāṃ mātāpy aṃśaṃ samaṃ haret
bhaginyaś ca nijād aṃśād dattvāṃśaṃ tu turīyakam
anyonyāpahṛtaṃ dravyaṃ vibhakte yat tu dṛśyate
tat punas te samair aṃśair vibhajerann iti sthitiḥ
ubhayor apy asau rikthī piṇḍadātā ca dharmataḥ
gṛhe pracchanna utpanno gūḍhajas tu sutaḥ smṛtaḥ
akṣatāyāṃ kṣatāyāṃ vā jātaḥ paunarbhavaḥ sutaḥ
dadyān mātā pitā vā yaṃ sa putro dattako bhavet
krītaś ca tābhyāṃ vikrītaḥ kṛtrimaḥ syāt svayaṃkṛtaḥ
dattvātmā tu svayaṃdatto garbhe vinnaḥ sahoḍhajaḥ
utsṛṣṭo gṛhyate yas tu so 'paviddho bhavet sutaḥ
sajātīyeṣv ayaṃ proktas tanayeṣu mayā vidhiḥ
mṛte pitari kuryus taṃ bhrātaras tv ardhabhāgikam
abhrātṛko haret sarvaṃ duhitṝṇāṃ sutād ṛte
patnī duhitaraś caiva pitarau bhrātaras tathā
svaryātasya hy aputrasya sarvavarṇeṣv ayaṃ vidhiḥ
saṃsṛṣṭinas tu saṃsṛṣṭī sodarasya tu sodaraḥ
dadyād apaharec cāṃśaṃ jātasya ca mṛtasya ca
anyodaryas tu saṃsṛṣṭī nānyodaryo dhanaṃ haret
klībo 'tha patitas tajjaḥ paṅgur unmattako jaḍaḥ
aurasāḥ kṣetrajās tv eṣāṃ nirdoṣā bhāgahāriṇaḥ
sutāś caiṣāṃ prabhartavyā yāvad vai bhartṛsātkṛtāḥ
bandhudattaṃ tathā śulkam anvādheyakam eva ca
duhitṝṇāṃ prasūtā cec cheṣeṣu pitṛgāmi tat
dattvā kanyāṃ haran daṇḍyo vyayaṃ dadyāc ca sodayam
gṛhītaṃ strīdhanaṃ bhartā na striyai dātum arhati
na dattaṃ strīdhanaṃ yasyai datte tv ardhaṃ prakalpayet
gopāḥ sīmākṛṣāṇā ye sarve ca vanagocarāḥ
sāmantā vā samagrāmāś catvāro 'ṣṭau daśāpi vā
anṛte tu pṛthag daṇḍyā rājñā madhyamasāhasam
phālāhatam api kṣetraṃ na kuryād yo na kārayet
sa pradāpyaḥ kṛṣṭaphalaṃ kṣetram anyena kārayet
māṣān aṣṭau tu mahiṣī sasyaghātasya kāriṇī
daṇḍanīyā tadardhaṃ tu gaus tadardham ajāvikam
yāvat sasyaṃ vinaśyet tu tāvat syāt kṣetriṇaḥ phalam
gopas tāḍyaś ca gomī tu pūrvoktaṃ daṇḍam arhati
pathi grāmavivītānte kṣetre doṣo na vidyate
pālo yeṣāṃ na te mocyā daivarājapariplutāḥ
yathārpitān paśūn gopaḥ sāyaṃ pratyarpayet tathā
dve śate kharvaṭasya syān nagarasya catuḥśatam
hīnād raho hīnamūlye velāhīne ca taskaraḥ
vikretur darśanāc chuddhiḥ svāmī dravyaṃ nṛpo damam
kretā mūlyam avāpnoti tasmād yas tasya vikrayī
hṛtaṃ pranaṣṭaṃ yo dravyaṃ parahastād avāpnuyāt
anivedya nṛpe daṇḍyaḥ sa tu ṣaṇṇavatiṃ paṇān
arvāk saṃvatsarāt svāmī hareta parato nṛpaḥ
paṇān ekaśaphe dadyāc caturaḥ pañca mānuṣe
mahiṣoṣṭragavāṃ dvau dvau pādaṃ pādam ajāvike
nānvaye sati sarvasvaṃ yac cānyasmai pratiśrutam
deyaṃ pratiśrutaṃ caiva dattvā nāpaharet punaḥ
agnau suvarṇam akṣīṇaṃ rajate dvipalaṃ śate
aṣṭau trapuṇi sīse ca tāmre pañca daśāyasi
madhye pañcapalā vṛddhiḥ sūkṣme tu tripalā matā
kārmike romabaddhe ca triṃśadbhāgaḥ kṣayo mataḥ
na kṣayo na ca vṛddhiś ca kauśeye vālkaleṣu ca
deśaṃ kālaṃ ca bhogaṃ ca jñātvā naṣṭe balābalam
dravyāṇāṃ kuśalā brūyur yat tad dāpyam asaṃśayam
rājā kṛtvā pure sthānaṃ brāhmaṇān nyasya tatra tu
traividyaṃ vṛttimad brūyāt svadharmaḥ pālyatām iti
so 'pi yatnena saṃrakṣyo dharmo rājakṛtaś ca yaḥ
gaṇadravyaṃ hared yas tu saṃvidaṃ laṅghayec ca yaḥ
yas tatra viparītaḥ syāt sa dāpyaḥ prathamaṃ damam
ekādaśaguṇaṃ dāpyo yady asau nārpayet svayam
bhedaṃ caiṣāṃ nṛpo rakṣet pūrvavṛttiṃ ca pālayet
agṛhīte samaṃ dāpyo bhṛtyai rakṣya upaskaraḥ
aniścitya bhṛtiṃ yas tu kārayet sa mahīkṣitā
deśaṃ kālaṃ ca yo 'tīyāl lābhaṃ kuryāc ca yo 'nyathā
tatra syāt svāminaś chando 'dhikaṃ deyaṃ kṛte 'dhike
yo yāvat kurute karma tāvat tasya tu vetanam
ubhayor apy asādhyaṃ cet sādhye kuryād yathāśrutam
arājadaivikaṃ naṣṭaṃ bhāṇḍaṃ dāpyas tu vāhakaḥ
prakrānte saptamaṃ bhāgaṃ caturthaṃ pathi saṃtyajan
bhṛtim ardhapathe sarvāṃ pradāpyas tyājako 'pi ca
glahe śatikavṛddhes tu sabhikaḥ pañcakaṃ śatam
sa samyakpālito dadyād rājñe bhāgaṃ yathākṛtam
jitam udgrāhayej jetre dadyāt satyaṃ vacaḥ kṣamī
jitaṃ sasabhike sthāne dāpayed anyathā na tu
draṣṭāro vyavahārāṇāṃ sākṣiṇaś ca ta eva hi
eṣa eva vidhir jñeyaḥ prāṇidyūte samāhvaye
kṣepaṃ karoti ced daṇḍyaḥ paṇān ardhatrayodaśān
abhigantāsmi bhaginīṃ mātaraṃ vā taveti ha
aśaktas tu vadann evaṃ daṇḍanīyaḥ paṇān daśa
tathā śaktaḥ pratibhuvaṃ dāpyaḥ kṣemāya tasya tu
sameṣv evaṃ parastrīṣu dviguṇas tūttameṣu ca
udgūrṇe prathamo daṇḍaḥ saṃsparśe tu tadardhikaḥ
śoṇitena vinā duḥkhaṃ kurvan kāṣṭhādibhir naraḥ
ekaṃ ghnatāṃ bahūnāṃ ca yathoktād dviguṇo damaḥ
kalahāpahṛtaṃ deyaṃ daṇḍaś ca dviguṇas tataḥ
duḥkham utpādayed yas tu sa samutthānajaṃ vyayam
dāpyo daṇḍaṃ ca yo yasmin kalahe samudāhṛtaḥ
paṇān dāpyaḥ pañca daśa viṃśatiṃ tad vyayaṃ tathā
duḥkhotpādi gṛhe dravyaṃ kṣipan prāṇaharaṃ tathā
ṣoḍaśādyaḥ paṇān dāpyo dvitīyo madhyamaṃ damam
liṅgasya chedane mṛtyau madhyamo mūlyam eva ca
jātadrumāṇāṃ dviguṇo damo vṛkṣe ca viśrute
tanmūlyād dviguṇo daṇḍo nihnave tu caturguṇaḥ
yaḥ sāhasaṃ kārayati sa dāpyo dviguṇaṃ damam
yaś caivam uktvāhaṃ dātā kārayet sa caturguṇam
akāraṇe ca vikroṣṭā caṇḍālaś cottamān spṛśet
śūdrapravrajitānāṃ ca daive pitrye ca bhojakaḥ
vasānastrīn paṇān daṇḍyo nejakas tu parāṃśukam
antare ca tayor yaḥ syāt tasyāpy aṣṭaguṇo damaḥ
ebhiś ca vyavahartā yaḥ sa dāpyo damam uttamam
akūṭaṃ kūṭakaṃ brūte kūṭaṃ yaś cāpy akūṭakam
bhiṣaṅ mithyācaran daṇḍyas tiryakṣu prathamaṃ damam
abandhyaṃ yaś ca badhnāti baddhaṃ yaś ca pramuñcati
aprāptavyavahāraṃ ca sa dāpyo damam uttamam
mānena tulayā vāpi yo 'ṃśam aṣṭamakaṃ haret
daṇḍaṃ sa dāpyo dviśataṃ vṛddhau hānau ca kalpitam
paṇyeṣu prakṣipan hīnaṃ paṇān dāpyas tu ṣoḍaśa
bhinne paṇe ca pañcāśatpaṇe tu śatam ucyate
dvipaṇe dviśato daṇḍo mūlyavṛddhau ca vṛddhimān
arghasya hrāsaṃ vṛddhiṃ vā jānato dama uttamaḥ
rājani sthāpyate yo 'rghaḥ pratyahaṃ tena vikrayaḥ
krayo vā niḥsravas tasmād vaṇijāṃ lābhakṛt smṛtaḥ
svadeśapaṇye tu śataṃ vaṇig gṛhṇīta pañcakam
daśakaṃ pāradeśye tu yaḥ sadyaḥ krayavikrayī
argho 'nugrahakṛt kāryaḥ kretur vikretur eva ca
gṛhītamūlyaṃ yaḥ paṇyaṃ kretur naiva prayacchati
sodayaṃ tasya dāpyo 'sau diglābhaṃ vā digāgate
hāniś cet kretṛdoṣeṇa kretur eva hi sā bhavet
anyahaste ca vikrīya duṣṭaṃ vāduṣṭavad yadi
vikrīṇīte damas tatra mūlyāt tu dviguṇo bhavet
kṣayaṃ vṛddhiṃ ca vaṇijā paṇyānām avijānatā
lābhālābhau yathādravyaṃ yathā vā saṃvidā kṛtau
pratiṣiddham anādiṣṭaṃ pramādād yac ca nāśitam
sa tad dadyād viplavāc ca rakṣitād daśamāṃśabhāk
arghaprakṣepaṇād viṃśaṃ bhāgaṃ śulkaṃ nṛpo haret
vyāsiddhaṃ rājayogyaṃ ca vikrītaṃ rājagāmi tat
dāpyas tv aṣṭaguṇaṃ yaś ca savyājakrayavikrayī
tarikaḥ sthalajaṃ śulkaṃ gṛhṇan dāpyaḥ paṇān daśa
jñātayo vā hareyus tadāgatās tair vinā nṛpaḥ
grāhakair gṛhyate cauro loptreṇātha padena vā
gṛhītaḥ śaṅkayā caurye nātmānaṃ ced viśodhayet
svasīṃni dadyād grāmas tu padaṃ vā yatra gacchati
pañcagrāmī bahiḥ krośād daśagrāmy atha vā punaḥ
dattvā caurasya vā hantur jānato dama uttamaḥ
praṣṭavyā yoṣitaś cāsya parapuṃsi ratāḥ pṛthak
strīdravyavṛttikāmo vā kena vāyaṃ gataḥ saha
sadyo vā kāmajaiś cihnaiḥ pratipattau dvayos tathā
strī niṣedhe śataṃ dadyād dviśataṃ tu damaṃ pumān
pratiṣedhe tayor daṇḍo yathā saṃgrahaṇe tathā
sajātāv uttamo daṇḍa ānulomye tu madhyamaḥ
alaṃkṛtāṃ haran kanyām uttamaṃ hy anyathādhamam
daṇḍaṃ dadyāt savarṇāsu prātilomye vadhaḥ smṛtaḥ
sakāmāsv anulomāsu na doṣas tv anyathā damaḥ
dūṣaṇe tu karaccheda uttamāyāṃ vadhas tathā
śataṃ strīdūṣaṇe dadyād dve tu mithyābhiśaṃsane
paśūn gacchan śataṃ dāpyo hīnāṃ strīṃ gāṃ ca madhyamam
gamyāsv api pumān dāpyaḥ pañcāśat paṇikaṃ damam
agṛhīte samaṃ dāpyaḥ pumān apy evam eva hi
śūdras tathāntya eva syād antyasyāryāgame vadhaḥ
ūnaṃ vābhyadhikaṃ vāpi likhed yo rājaśāsanam
madhyamaṃ kṣatriyaṃ vaiśyaṃ prathamaṃ śūdram ardhikam
śakto 'py amokṣayan svāmī daṃṣṭriṇāṃ śṛṅgiṇāṃ tathā
prathamaṃ sāhasaṃ dadyād vikruṣṭe dviguṇaṃ tathā
jāraṃ caurety abhivadan dāpyaḥ pañcaśataṃ damam
tanmantrasya ca bhettāraṃ chittvā jihvāṃ pravāsayet
durdṛṣṭāṃs tu punar dṛṣṭvā vyavahārān nṛpeṇa tu
sabhyāḥ sajayino daṇḍyā vivādād dviguṇaṃ damam
tam āyāntaṃ punar jitvā dāpayed dviguṇaṃ damam
rājñānyāyena yo daṇḍo gṛhīto varuṇāya tam
ūnadvivarṣaṃ nikhanen na kuryād udakaṃ tataḥ
apa naḥ śośucad agham anena pitṛdiṅmukhāḥ
na brahmacāriṇaḥ kuryur udakaṃ patitās tathā
pañcadhā saṃbhṛtaḥ kāyo yadi pañcatvam āgataḥ
gantrī vasumatī nāśam udadhir daivatāni ca
phenaprakhyaḥ kathaṃ nāśaṃ martyaloko na yāsyati
śleṣmāśru bāndhavair muktaṃ preto bhuṅkte yato 'vaśaḥ
ato na roditavyaṃ hi kriyāḥ kāryāḥ svaśaktitaḥ
saṃkaṭānnaṃ ca nāśnīyān na ca taiḥ saha saṃvaset
krītalabdhāśanā bhūmau svapeyus te pṛthak kṣitau
jalam ekāham ākāśe sthāpyaṃ kṣīraṃ ca mṛnmaye
trirātraṃ daśarātraṃ vā śāvam āśaucam iṣyate
ūnadvivarṣa ubhayoḥ sūtakaṃ mātur eva hi
pitros tu sūtakaṃ mātus tad asṛgdarśanād dhruvam
tad ahar na praduṣyeta pūrveṣāṃ janmakāraṇāt
garbhasrāve māsatulyā niśāḥ śuddhes tu kāraṇam
proṣite kālaśeṣaḥ syāt pūrṇe dattvodakaṃ śuciḥ
ahas tv adattakanyāsu bāleṣu ca viśodhanam
brāhmaṇenānugantavyo na śūdro na dvijaḥ kvacit
ṛtvijāṃ dīkṣitānāṃ ca yajñiyaṃ karma kurvatām
dāne vivāhe yajñe ca saṃgrāme deśaviplave
āpadyapi hi kaṣṭāyāṃ sadyaḥ śaucaṃ vidhīyate
abliṅgāni japec caiva gāyatrīṃ manasā sakṛt
kālo 'gniḥ karma mṛd vāyur mano jñānaṃ tapo jalam
akāryakāriṇāṃ dānaṃ vego nadyāś ca śuddhikṛt
śodhyasya mṛc ca toyaṃ ca saṃnyāso vai dvijanmanām
tapo vedavidāṃ kṣāntir viduṣāṃ varṣmaṇo jalam
kṣātreṇa karmaṇā jīved viśāṃ vāpy āpadi dvijaḥ
nistīrya tām athātmānaṃ pāvayitvā nyaset pathi
dharmārthaṃ vikrayaṃ neyās tilā dhānyena tatsamāḥ
pāyo dadhi ca madyaṃ ca hīnavarṇakarāṇi tu
āpadgataḥ saṃpragṛhṇan bhuñjāno vā yatas tataḥ
na lipyetainasā vipro jvalanārkasamo hi saḥ
kṛṣiḥ śilpaṃ bhṛtir vidyā kusīdaṃ śakaṭaṃ giriḥ
sevānūpaṃ nṛpo bhaikṣam āpattau jīvanāni tu
bubhukṣitas tryahaṃ sthitvā dhānyam abrāhmaṇād haret
tasya vṛttaṃ kulaṃ śīlaṃ śrutam adhyayanaṃ tapaḥ
jñātvā rājā kuṭumbaṃ ca dharmyāṃ vṛttiṃ prakalpayet
ahno māsasya ṣaṇṇāṃ vā tathā saṃvatsarasya vā
arthasya saṃcayaṃ kuryāt kṛtam āśvayuje tyajet
śrautraṃ smārtaṃ phalasnehaiḥ karma kuryāt tathā kriyāḥ
cāndrāyaṇair nayet kālaṃ kṛcchrair vā vartayet sadā
pakṣe gate vāpy aśnīyān māse vāhani vā gate
svapyād bhūmau śucī rātrau divā saṃprapadair nayet
ārdravāsās tu hemante śaktyā vāpi tapaś caret
yaḥ kaṇṭakair vitudati candanair yaś ca liṃpati
akruddho 'parituṣṭaś ca samastasya ca tasya ca
grāmād āhṛtya vā grāsān aṣṭau bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ
prājāpatyāṃ tadante tān agnīn āropya cātmani
śaktyā ca yajñakṛn mokṣe manaḥ kuryāt tu nānyathā
bhayaṃ hitvā ca bhūtānām amṛtībhavati dvijaḥ
avekṣyā garbhavāsāś ca karmajā gatayas tathā
nāśramaḥ kāraṇaṃ dharme kriyamāṇo bhaved hi saḥ
ato yad ātmano 'pathyaṃ pareṣāṃ na tad ācaret
satyam asteyam akrodho hrīḥ śaucaṃ dhīr dhṛtir damaḥ
sakāśād ātmanas tadvad ātmānaḥ prabhavanti hi
tatrātmā hi svayaṃ kiṃcit karma kiṃcit svabhāvataḥ
nimittam akṣaraḥ kartā boddhā guṇī vaśī
ajaḥ śarīragrahaṇāt sa jāta iti kīrtyate
sargādau sa yathākāśaṃ vāyuṃ jyotir jalaṃ mahīm
pañcadhātūn svayaṃ ṣaṣṭha ādatte yugapat prabhuḥ
indriyāṇi manaḥ prāṇo jñānam āyuḥ sukhaṃ dhṛtiḥ
dhāraṇā preraṇaṃ duḥkham icchāhaṃkāra eva ca
tasyaitad ātmajaṃ sarvam anāder ādim icchataḥ
māsy arbudaṃ dvitīye tu tṛtīye 'ṅgendriyair yutaḥ
ākāśāl lāghavaṃ saukṣmyaṃ śabdaṃ śrotraṃ balādikam
vāyoś ca sparśanaṃ ceṣṭāṃ vyūhanaṃ raukṣyam eva ca
pittāt tu darśanaṃ paktim auṣṇyaṃ rūpaṃ prakāśitām
rasāt tu rasanaṃ śaityaṃ snehaṃ kledaṃ samārdavam
bhūmer gandhaṃ tathā ghrāṇaṃ gauravaṃ mūrtim eva ca
ātmā gṛhṇāty ajaḥ sarvaṃ tṛtīye spandate tataḥ
vairūpyaṃ maraṇaṃ vāpi tasmāt kāryaṃ priyaṃ striyāḥ
sthairyaṃ caturthe tv aṅgānāṃ pañcame śoṇitodbhavaḥ
ṣaṣṭhe balasya varṇasya nakharomṇāṃ ca saṃbhavaḥ
punar dhātrīṃ punar gharmam ojas tasya pradhāvati
aṣṭame māsy ato garbho jātaḥ prāṇair viyujyate
tasya ṣoḍhā śarīrāṇi śaṭ tvaco dhārayanti ca
saḍaṅgāni tathāsthnāṃ ca saha ṣaṣṭyā śatatrayam
sthālaiḥ saha catuḥṣaṣṭir dantā vai viṃśatir nakhāḥ
ṣaṣṭyaṅgulīnāṃ dve pārṣṇyor gulpheṣu ca catuṣṭayam
bhagāsthy ekaṃ tathā pṛṣṭhe catvāriṃśac ca pañca ca
grīvā pañcadaśāsthiḥ syāj jatrv ekaikaṃ tathā hanuḥ
pārśvakāḥ sthālakaiḥ sārdham arbudaiś ca dvisaptatiḥ
dvau śaṅkhakau kapālāni catvāri śirasas tathā
nāsikā locane jihvā tvak śrotraṃ ca indriyāṇi ca
hastau pāyur upasthaṃ ca jihvā pādau ca pañca vai
nābhir ojo gudaṃ śukraṃ śoṇitaṃ śaṅkhakau tathā
vapā vasāvahananaṃ nābhiḥ kloma yakṛt plihā
kṣudrāntraṃ vṛkkakau bastiḥ purīṣādhānam eva ca
āmāśayo 'tha hṛdayaṃ sthūlāntraṃ guda eva ca
udaraṃ ca gudau koṣṭhyau vistāro 'yam udāhṛtaḥ
karṇau śaṅkhau bhruvau dantaveṣṭāv oṣṭhau kakundare
avaṭaś caivam etāni sthānāny atra śarīrake
nava chidrāṇi tāny eva prāṇasyāyatanāni tu
śirāḥ śatāni saptaiva nava snāyuśatāni ca
dhamanīnāṃ śate dve tu pañca peśīśatāni ca
trayo lakṣās tu vijñeyāḥ śmaśrukeśāḥ śarīriṇām
saptottaraṃ marmaśataṃ dve ca saṃdhiśate tathā
romṇāṃ koṭyas tu pañcāśac catasraḥ koṭya eva ca
saptaṣaṣṭis tathā lakṣāḥ sārdhāḥ svedāyanaiḥ saha
yady apy eko 'nuvetty eṣāṃ bhāvanāṃ caiva saṃsthitim
ṣaṭ śleṣmā pañca pittaṃ tu catvāro mūtram eva ca
vasā trayo dvau tu medo majjaikordhvamardham? tu mastake
śleṣmaujasas tāvad eva retasas tāvad eva tu
ity etad asthiraṃ varṣma yasya mokṣāya kṛty asau
hitāhitā nāma nāḍyas tāsāṃ madhye śaśiprabham
maṇḍalaṃ tasya madhyastha ātmā dīpa ivācalaḥ
sa jñeyas taṃ viditveha punar ājāyate na tu
jñeyaṃ cāraṇyakam ahaṃ yad ādityād avāptavān
yogaśāstraṃ ca matproktaṃ jñeyaṃ yogam abhīpsatā
dhyeya ātmā sthito yo 'sau hṛdaye dīpavat prabhuḥ
gītajño yadi yogena nāpnoti paramaṃ padam
anādir ātmā kathitas tasyādis tu śarīrakam
ātmanas tu jagat sarvaṃ jagataś cātmasaṃbhavaḥ
jagadudbhūtam ātmā ca kathaṃ tasmin vadasva naḥ
mohajālam apāsyeha puruṣo dṛśyate hi yaḥ
sa ātmā caiva yajñaś ca viśvarūpaḥ prajāpatiḥ
devān saṃtarpya sa raso yajamānaṃ phalena ca
saṃyojya vāyunā somaṃ nīyate raśmibhis tataḥ
khamaṇḍalād asau sūryaḥ sṛjaty amṛtam uttamam
tasmād annāt punar yajñaḥ punar annaṃ punaḥ kratuḥ
sahasrātmā mayā yo vavā? ādideva udāhṛtaḥ
pṛthivī pādatas tasya śiraso dyaur ajāyata
nastaḥ prāṇā diśaḥ śrotrāt sparśād vāyur mukhāc chikhī
manasaś candramā jātaś cakṣuṣaś ca divākaraḥ
jaghanād antarikṣaṃ ca jagac ca sacarācaram
yady evaṃ sa kathaṃ brahman pāpayoniṣu jāyate
īśvaraḥ sa kathaṃ bhāvair aniṣṭaiḥ saṃprayujyate
karaṇair anvitasyāpi pūrvaṃ jñānaṃ kathaṃ ca na
vetti sarvagatāṃ kasmāt sarvago 'pi na vedanām
doṣaiḥ prayāti jīvo 'yaṃ bhavaṃ yoniśateṣu ca
anantāś ca yathā bhāvāḥ śarīreṣu śarīriṇām
vipākaḥ karmaṇāṃ pretya keṣāṃcid iha jāyate
iha vāmutra vaikeṣāṃ bhāvas tatra prayojanam
nidrāluḥ krūrakṛl lubdho nāstiko yācakas tathā
rajasā tamasā caivaṃ samāviṣṭo bhramann iha
malino hi yathā ādarśo rūpālokasya na kṣamaḥ
kaṭver vārau yathāpakve madhuraḥ san raso 'pi na
prāpyate hy ātmani tathā nāpakvakaraṇe jñatā
sarvāśrayāṃ nije dehe dehī vindati vedanām
yogī muktaś ca sarvāsāṃ yo na cāpnoti vedanām
ākāśam ekaṃ hi yathā ghaṭādiṣu pṛthag bhavet
tathātmā eko hy anekaś ca jalādhāreṣv ivāṃśumān
ime lokā eṣa cātmā tasmāc ca sacarācaram
kāraṇāny evam ādāya tāsu tāsv iha yoniṣu
sṛjaty ātmānam ātmā ca saṃbhūya karaṇāni ca
vācaṃ vā ko vijānāti punaḥ saṃśrutya saṃśrutām
atītārthasmṛtiḥ kasya ko vā svapnasya kārakaḥ
sa saṃdigdhamatiḥ karmaphalam asti na veti vā
viplutaḥ siddham ātmānam asiddho 'pi hi manyate
mama dārāḥ sutāmātyā aham eṣām iti sthitiḥ
tatkarmaṇām anuṣṭhānaṃ saṅgaḥ sadbhir giraḥ śubhāḥ
etair upāyaiḥ saṃśuddhaḥ sattvayogy amṛtī bhavet
karmaṇāṃ saṃnikarṣāc ca satāṃ yogaḥ pravartate
yathā hi bharato varṇair varṇayaty ātmanas tanum
anantā raśmayas tasya dīpavad yaḥ sthito hṛdi
ūrdhvam ekaḥ sthitas teṣāṃ yo bhittvā sūryamaṇḍalam
brahmalokam atikramya tena yāti parāṃ gatim
yad asyānyad raśmiśatam ūrdhvam eva vyavasthitam
vedaiḥ śāstraiḥ savijñānair janmanā maraṇena ca
ārtyā gatyā tathāgatyā satyena hy anṛtena ca
ahaṃkāraḥ smṛtir medhā dveṣo buddhiḥ sukhaṃ dhṛtiḥ
svargaḥ svapnaś ca bhāvānāṃ preraṇaṃ manaso gatiḥ
tasmād asti paro dehād ātmā sarvaga īśvaraḥ
ahaṃkāraś ca buddhiś ca pṛthivyādīni caiva hi
īśravaḥ sarvabhūtasthaḥ sann asan sad asac ca yaḥ
śabdaḥ sparśaś ca rūpaṃ ca raso gandhaś ca tadguṇāḥ
yo yasmān niḥsṛtaś caiṣāṃ sa tasminn eva līyate
yathātmānaṃ sṛjaty ātmā tathā vaḥ kathito mayā
sattvaṃ rajas tamaś caiva guṇās tasyaiva kīrtitāḥ
rajastamobhyām āviṣṭaś cakravad bhrāmyate hy asau
anādir ādimāṃś caiva sa eva puruṣaḥ paraḥ
ye ca dānaparāḥ samyag aṣṭābhiś ca guṇair yutāḥ
ślokā sūtrāṇi bhāṣyāṇi yac ca kiṃcana vāṅmayam
sa hy āśramair vijijñāsyaḥ samastair evam eva tu
draṣṭavyas tv atha mantavyaḥ śrotavyaś ca dvijātibhiḥ
ya enam evaṃ vindanti ya vāraṇyakam āśritāḥ
upāsate dvijāḥ satyaṃ śraddhayā parayā yutāḥ
kramāt te saṃbhavanty arcir ahaḥ śuklaṃ tathottaram
karoti punarāvṛttis teṣām iha na vidyate
yajñena tapasā dānair ye hi svargajito narāḥ
dhūmaṃ niśāṃ kṛṣṇapakṣaṃ dakṣiṇāyanam eva ca
pitṛlokaṃ candramasaṃ vāyuṃ vṛṣṭiṃ jalaṃ mahīm
kramāt te saṃbhavantīha punar eva vrajanti ca
etad yo na vijānāti mārgadvitayam ātmavān
dandaśūkaḥ pataṅgo vā bhavet kīṭo 'tha vā kṛmiḥ
uttānaṃ kiṃcid unnāmya mukhaṃ viṣṭabhya corasā
tato dhyeyaḥ sthito yo 'sau hṛdaye dīpavat prabhuḥ
dhārayet tatra cātmānaṃ dhāraṇāṃ dhārayan budhaḥ
antardhānaṃ smṛtiḥ kāntir dṛṣṭiḥ śrotrajñatā tathā
arthānāṃ chandataḥ sṛṣṭir yogasiddher hi lakṣaṇam
siddhe yoge tyajan deham amṛtatvāya kalpate
atha vāpy abhyasan vedaṃ nyastakarmā vane vasan
śrādhakṛt satyavādī ca gṛhastho 'pi hi mucyate
yo yena saṃvasaty eṣāṃ sa talliṅgo 'bhijāyate
tailahṛt tailapāyī syāt pūtivaktras tu sūcakaḥ
parasya yoṣitaṃ hṛtvā brahmasvam apahṛtya ca
patraśākaṃ śikhī hatvā gandhān chucchundarī śubhān
mūṣako dhānyahārī syād yānam uṣṭraḥ kapiḥ phalam
jalaṃ plavaḥ payaḥ kāko gṛhakārī hy upaskaram
madhu daṃśaḥ palaṃ gṛdhro gāṃ godhāgniṃ bakas tathā
śvitrī vastraṃ śvā rasaṃ tu cīrī lavaṇahārakaḥ
evam asyāntarātmā ca lokaś caiva prasīdati
prāyaścittair apaity eno yad ajñānakṛtaṃ bhavet
kāmato vyavahāryas tu vacanād iha jāyate
ete mahāpātakino yaś ca taiḥ saha saṃvaset
pituḥ svasāraṃ mātuś ca matulānīṃ snuṣām api
liṅgaṃ chittvā vadhas tasya sakāmāyāḥ striyā api
nāstikyaṃ vratalopaś ca sutānāṃ caiva vikrayaḥ
dṛṣṭvā pathi nirātaṅkaṃ kṛtvā tu brahmahā śuciḥ
ānīya viprasarvasvaṃ hṛtaṃ ghātita eva vā
tannimittaṃ kṣataḥ śastrair jīvann api viśudhyati
lomabhyaḥ svāhety evaṃ hi lomaprabhṛti vai tanum
majjāntāṃ juhuyād vāpi mantrair ebhir yathākramam
saṃgrāme vā hato lakṣyabhūtaḥ śuddhim avāpnuyāt
araṇye niyato japtvā trir vai vedasya saṃhitām
pātre dhanaṃ vā paryāptaṃ dattvā śuddhim avāpnuyāt
ādātuś ca viśuddhyartham iṣṭair vaiśvānarī smṛtā
cared vratam ahatvāpi ghātārthaṃ cet samāgataḥ
dviguṇaṃ savanasthe tu brāhmaṇe vratam ādiśet
piṇyākaṃ vā kaṇān vāpi bhakṣayet trisamā niśi
ajñānāt tu surāṃ pītvā reto viṇmūtram eva ca
punaḥ saṃskāram arhanti trayo varṇā dvijātayaḥ
patilokaṃ na sā yāti brāhmaṇī yā surāṃ pibet
ihaiva sā śunī gṛdhrī sūkarī copajāyate
svakarma vyākhyāyaṃs tena hato mukto 'pi vāśuciḥ
ātmatulyaṃ suvarṇaṃ vā dadyād vā vipratuṣṭikṛt
prājāpatyaṃ caret kṛcchraṃ samā vā gurutalpagaḥ
cāndrāyaṇaṃ vā trīn māsān abhyased vedasaṃhitām
ebhis tu saṃvased yo vai vatsaraṃ so 'pi tatsamaḥ
cāndrāyaṇaṃ caret sarvān avakṛṣṭān nihatya tu
pañcagavyaṃ pibed goghno māsam āsīta saṃyataḥ
kṛcchraṃ caivātikṛcchraṃ ca cared vāpi samāhitaḥ
dadyāt trirātraṃ copoṣya vṛṣabhaikādaśās tu gāḥ
payasā vāpi māsena parākeṇātha vā punaḥ
vaiśyahābdaṃ cared etad dadyād vaikaśataṃ gavām
ṣaṇmāsāc chūdrahāpy etad dhenur dadyād daśātha vā
dṛtiṃ dhanur bastam aviṃ kramād dadyād viśuddhaye
hatvā tryahaṃ pibet kṣīraṃ kṛcchraṃ vā pādikaṃ caret
gaje nīlavṛṣāḥ pañca śuke vatso dvihāyanaḥ
bhāsaṃ ca hatvā dadyād gām akravyādas tu vatsikām
urageṣv āyaso daṇḍaḥ paṇḍake trapu sīsakam
kole ghṛtaghaṭo deya uṣṭre guñjā haye 'ṃśukam
dānaṃ dātuṃ caret kṛcchram ekaikasya viśuddhaye
kiṃcit sāsthivadhe deyaṃ prāṇāyāmas tv anasthike
prāṇāyāmaṃ jale kṛtvā ghṛtaṃ prāśya viśudhyati
yan me 'dya reta ityābhyāṃ skannaṃ reto 'bhimantrayet
mayi teja iti chāyāṃ svāṃ dṛṣṭvāmbugatāṃ japet
sāvitrīm aśucau dṛṣṭe cāpalye cānṛte 'pi ca
avakīrṇī bhaved gatvā brahmacārī tu yoṣitam
gardabhaṃ paśum ālabhya nairṛtaṃ sa viśudhyati
upasthānaṃ tataḥ kuryāt saṃ mā siṃcantv anena tu
kṛcchratrayaṃ guruḥ kuryān mriyate prahito yadi
kriyamāṇopakāre tu mṛte vipre na pātakam
abbhakṣo māsam āsīta sa jāpī niyatendriyaḥ
abhiśasto mṛṣā kṛcchraṃ cared āgneyam eva vā
nirvapet tu puroḍāśaṃ vāyavyaṃ paśum eva vā
vedaplāvī yavāśy abdaṃ tyaktvā ca śaraṇāgatam
goṣṭhe vasan brahmacārī māsam ekaṃ payovratam
nagnaḥ snātvā ca bhuktvā ca gatvā caiva divā striyam
guruṃ huṃkṛtya tvaṃkṛtya vipraṃ nirjitya vādataḥ
baddhvā vā vāsasā kṣipraṃ prasādyopavased dinam
deśaṃ kālaṃ vayaḥ śaktiṃ pāpaṃ cāvekṣya yatnataḥ
prāyaścittaṃ prakalpyaṃ syād yatra coktā na niṣkṛtiḥ
patitasya bahiḥ kuryuḥ sarvakāryeṣu caiva tam
jugupseran na cāpy enaṃ saṃvaseyuś ca sarvaśaḥ
patitānām eṣa eva vidhiḥ strīṇāṃ prakīrtitaḥ
vāso gṛhāntake deyam annaṃ vāsaḥ sarakṣaṇam
sa dadyāt prathamaṃ gobhiḥ satkṛtasya hi satkriyā

rahasyaprāyaścittam
	  anabhikhyātadoṣas tu rahasyaṃ vratam ācaret
antarjale viśudhyeta dattvā gāṃ ca payasvinām
lomabhyaḥ svāhety atha vā divasaṃ mārutāśanaḥ
gaur deyā karmaṇo 'syānte pṛthag ebhiḥ payasvinī
niśāyāṃ vā divā vāpi yad ajñānakṛtaṃ bhavet
yatra yatra ca saṃkīrṇam ātmānaṃ manyate dvijaḥ
tatra tatra tilair homo gāyatryā vācanaṃ tathā
vāyubhakṣo divā tiṣṭhan rātriṃ nītvāpsu sūryadṛk
japtvā sahasraṃ gāyatryāḥ śudhyed brahmavadhād ṛte
brahmacaryaṃ dayā kṣāntir dānaṃ satyam akalkatā
ahiṃsā steyamādhurye damaś ceti yamāḥ smṛtāḥ
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi sarpiḥ kuśodakam
jagdhvā pare 'hny upavaset kṛcchraṃ sāntapanaṃ caret
ekaikaṃ hrāsayet kṛṣne piṇḍaṃ cāndrāyaṇaṃ caran
dharmārthaṃ yaś cared etac candrasyaiti salokatām
kṛcchrakṛd dharmakāmas tu mahatīṃ śriyam āpnuyāt
iha loke yaśaḥ prāpya te yāsyanti triviṣṭapam
vidyārthī prāpnuyād vidyāṃ dhanakāmo dhanaṃ tathā
ślokatrayam api hy asmād yaḥ śrāddhe śrāvayiṣyati
pitṝṇāṃ tasya tṛptiḥ syād akṣayyā nātra saṃśayaḥ
brāhmaṇaḥ pātratāṃ yāti kṣatriyo vijayī bhavet
vaiśyaś ca dhānyadhanavān asya śāstrasya dhāraṇāt
ya idaṃ śrāvayed vidvān dvijān parvasu parvasu
evam astv iti hovāca namaskṛtya svayaṃbhuve
